args.message: Welcome! You're looking at a fantastic 2016 Chevrolet Tahoe LT, well-equipped with luxurious leather seating, Bose audio, and third-row capability. With just 142,000 miles on the clock, it's been dealer-serviced and is ready for your next family adventure. Trust me, this full-size SUV runs strong with its reliable 5.3L V8 engine and has plenty of space for all your activities!
